description.ko: 우주의 가장 먼 심연으로의 탐험, 미지의 존재 주위로 빛이 굴절되고 우주의 침묵이 실체화되는 공간.
description.en: An exploration into the furthest reaches of the cosmic void, where light bends around the unknown and the silence of the universe becomes tangible.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of VOID-3, a massive gravitational anomaly in deep space, swirling dark matter and vibrant neon nebulae, event horizon glowing with ethereal blue light, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, cosmic dust, stars collapsing into the void, dark atmospheric lighting.
